actions.name: 客户编号_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 客户编号_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT DISTINCT khsheet3.kh_id,khsheet3.company_name 
FROM khsheet3 
WHERE (khsheet3.ywry=[资信调查.业务人员]) 
  OR (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_) 
  OR (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)

actions.name: 贸易国别_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 贸易国别_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT dm,mc 
FROM xbzxsheet 
WHERE (ssmk="国家代码") 
ORDER BY xbzxsheet.mc ASC

actions.name: 事_贸易国别
actions.caption: 事_贸易国别
actions.expression:
SELECT dm,mc 
FROM xbzxsheet 
WHERE (ssmk="国家代码") 
  AND (mc=[资信调查.贸易国别]) 
ORDER BY xbzxsheet.mc ASC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 事_贸易国别2
actions.caption: 事_贸易国别2
actions.expression:
SELECT mygb.dqzw 
FROM mygb 
WHERE (mygb.mygb=[资信调查.贸易国别]) LIMIT 1
